main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'oxidative damage por ClO2 piscifactoría + SBS insuficiente' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Increase SBS 4→12 mg/L + verify ORP <100 + total chlorine <0.05 — match gold (aumentar SBS).

requested_data.justification: Pide ClO2 concentration amperométrico/DPD-glicina — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: ClO2 <0.02 + conductividad rise persiste → switch a envejecimiento/non-oxidative.
